global.title: The Operational Hub has four tiers: Essentials (free tools), Starter (entity + basic ops), Standard (full ops + contributors), and Custom.
global.content:
The Operational Hub service offering has four tiers:

**Essentials (free)**
Self-service tools: legal document templates, global invoice generator, budget generator, needs analysis. Also includes exchange setup, crypto-friendly banking, off-ramp setup, EOR/PEO setup, payment controls, and audit support. Plus AI agent services (information retrieval, document generation, data entry, workflow execution, task routing, reporting). This tier is the top of the funnel — free tools that demonstrate value.

**Starter**
Everything in Essentials plus: Swiss Association setup with licensed counsel, registered address in Zug, VAT registration, annual tax filing, reimbursement management, invoice management, monthly accounting & close, monthly expense reports.

**Standard**
Everything in Starter plus: expense policies, contributor onboarding & operations, multi-currency payouts (crypto-to-fiat in USD/GBP/EUR/CHF/DKK within 48h), dedicated ops support. Also adds compliance services: supplier & partner liaison, AML monitoring, contractor documentation, invoice compliance review, card & spend operations, legal counsel advice (5 hours).

**Custom**
Everything in Standard plus: multiple entities, dedicated account manager, admin portal, custom workflows & reporting.

Billing cycles: quarterly or annual. The tiered structure creates a natural upsell path from free tools to full-service operations.
global.description: Four-tier pricing from free self-service tools to full-service custom ops. Billing cycles: quarterly or annual.
